steps.title: Use symmetry around the center
steps.content: The equation $(x-42)^2=1$ means each solution is $1$ unit away from $42$. So the two solutions are symmetric around $42$.

steps.title: Add the symmetric solutions
steps.content:
The two solutions are $42-1$ and $42+1$. Their sum is
$$(42-1)+(42+1)=84$$
The answer is 84.
